patterns: modes of expression - signs/gestures/sounds. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
146 C3E C3E_COMM_BOARD (C3E) Communication Board CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: modes of expression - communication board. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
147 C3F C3F_OTHER (C3F) Other Mode of Expression CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: modes of expression - other. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
148 C3G C3G_NONE_ABOVE (C3G) None of Above Modes of Expression
